title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.30.1 - autoclosed
body:

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://togithub.com/containers/image) | `v5.30.0` -> `v5.30.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.30.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.30.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.30.0/v5.30.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fimage%2fv5/v5.30.0/v5.30.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.30.1`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.30.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.30.0...v5.30.1)

This fixes CVE-2024-3727 .

Digest values used throughout this library were not always validated. That allowed attackers to trigger, when pulling untrusted images, unexpected authenticated registry accesses on behalf of a victim user.

In less common uses of this library (using other transports or not using the `containers/image/v5/copy.Image` API), an attacker could also trigger local path traversals or crashes.

</details>

---

We were not able to find or create Copr project `packit/containers-skopeo-2323` specified in the config with the following error:
```
Cannot create a new Copr project (owner=packit project=containers-skopeo-2323 chroots=['centos-stream-10-aarch64', 'centos-stream-9-aarch64', 'centos-stream-10-x86_64', 'centos-stream-9-x86_64']): Copr: 'packit/containers-skopeo-2323' already exists
```
---
Please check your configuration for:

1. typos in owner and project name (groups need to be prefixed with `@`)
2. whether the project name doesn't contain not allowed characters (only letters, digits, underscores, dashes and dots must be used)
3. whether the project itself exists (Packit creates projects only in its own namespace)
4. whether Packit is allowed to build in your Copr project
5. whether your Copr project/group is not private
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

```
execv(/usr/bin/dnf-3) failed: No such file or directory
```
@lsm5 FYI, I can’t recall seeing this before. It seems unlikely to be our fault at a glance.
